torch_pattern:
output_tensor = input_tensor_a * input_tensor_b
output_tensor = apply_activations(output_tensor, activations)
applicability_notes: In-place elementwise multiply; first operand is overwritten with the product. Optional fused unary activations applied to the result (golden: apply_activations). Useful for fusing 'y = a * b; y = act(y)' chains where 'a' is dead after the multiply.

placement_observations.tensor_role: input_a (in-place destination, e.g. noise_pred / sigma_difference latents-shaped tensor)
placement_observations.size_descriptor: latents-shaped activation tensor (diffusion denoising loop, per-submesh shard)
placement_observations.source: call_site: SD/Flux pipeline scheduler step — ttnn.multiply_(noise_pred_list[submesh_id], sigma_difference_device[submesh_id]); no explicit memory_config passed, default interleaved DRAM; note 'This allocates during trace' comment indicates in-place op still allocates intermediates under trace capture
